channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: U.S. lifts Iran oil sanctions. And, federal judge rules SAVE voter tool unlawful
item.description: The U.S. has temporarily lifted oil sanctions on Iran as peace talks continue. And, a federal judge ruled that the Trump administration's data system, known as SAVE, is unlawful.
item.content:encoded:
The U.S. has temporarily lifted oil sanctions on Iran as peace talks continue. And, a federal judge ruled that the Trump administration's data system, known as SAVE, is unlawful.

(Image credit: Nathan Howard)
item.dc:creator: Brittney Melton

item.title: When falling housing prices are good news — and when they're not
item.description: Denver renters are celebrating falling housing costs. But sometimes cheaper housing is a sign of economic decline. How can you tell the difference?
item.content:encoded:
Denver renters are celebrating falling housing costs. But sometimes cheaper housing is a sign of economic decline. How can you tell the difference?

(Image credit: Scott Olson)
item.dc:creator: Greg Rosalsky

item.title: Iran's president heads to Pakistan as the U.S. and Iran work on a war-ending deal
item.description: President Masoud Pezeshkian's visit to Islamabad comes as technical teams were working on details of a deal, following high-level negotiations with Vice President Vance in Switzerland.
item.content:encoded:
President Masoud Pezeshkian's visit to Islamabad comes as technical teams were working on details of a deal, following high-level negotiations with Vice President Vance in Switzerland.

(Image credit: Anjum Naveed)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: People fired over Charlie Kirk posts get big payouts for First Amendment retaliation
item.description: While workers, who were employees in government or public institutions, feel vindicated by how their lawsuits concluded, they are still grappling with the aftermath.
item.content:encoded:
While workers, who were employees in government or public institutions, feel vindicated by how their lawsuits concluded, they are still grappling with the aftermath.

(Image credit: Kathryn Gamble for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Huo Jingnan

item.title: As Republican Party looks to future without Trump in office, Utah could be a road map
item.description: In 2028, President Trump will not be on the ballot, leaving Republicans to decide the future of the party. Utah — which has a complicated relationship with the president — could be a starting point.
item.content:encoded:
In 2028, President Trump will not be on the ballot, leaving Republicans to decide the future of the party. Utah — which has a complicated relationship with the president — could be a starting point.

(Image credit: Rick Egan)
item.dc:creator: Saige Miller

item.title: Lebanese struggle to get by in an ancient city under Israeli evacuation order
item.description: In one of the oldest cities in Lebanon, once besieged by Alexander the Great, ordinary people struggle to survive Israeli attacks.
item.content:encoded:
In one of the oldest cities in Lebanon, once besieged by Alexander the Great, ordinary people struggle to survive Israeli attacks.

(Image credit: Diego Ibarra Sánchez for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Jane Arraf

item.title: How Trump's 'Complete and Total Endorsement' has reshaped the Republican Party
item.description: An NPR analysis of more than a thousand Trump endorsements in House, Senate and governor races over the last decade finds the president now picks candidates earlier — and in safer races.
item.content:encoded:
An NPR analysis of more than a thousand Trump endorsements in House, Senate and governor races over the last decade finds the president now picks candidates earlier — and in safer races.

(Image credit: Win McNamee)
item.dc:creator: Stephen Fowler

item.title: Trouble getting weight loss drugs covered by insurance? Here's what to know
item.description: If your doctor prescribes a GLP-1 medication for weight loss but your insurance won't cover it, you have options.
item.content:encoded:
If your doctor prescribes a GLP-1 medication for weight loss but your insurance won't cover it, you have options.

(Image credit: Oona Zenda)
item.dc:creator: Sydney Lupkin

item.title: This man is a bus driver and grandfather. A Supreme Court ruling could reimprison him
item.description: Anthony Bailey's case is one of about a dozen that could be directly affected by a Supreme Court ruling limiting how prisoners can use the compassionate release program to get out early.
item.content:encoded:
Anthony Bailey's case is one of about a dozen that could be directly affected by a Supreme Court ruling limiting how prisoners can use the compassionate release program to get out early.

(Image credit: Via Anthony Bailey)
item.dc:creator: Carrie Johnson

item.title: Morning news brief
item.description: U.S. lifts oil sanctions on Iran, Trump visits Pennsylvania to tout economic wins, judge blocks DOJ subpoenas targeting Minnesota officials.
item.content:encoded: U.S. lifts oil sanctions on Iran, Trump visits Pennsylvania to tout economic wins, judge blocks DOJ subpoenas targeting Minnesota officials.
item.dc:creator: A Martínez
